content:
This Month's Energy

Leo, May 2026 builds from foundation to spotlight. The Scorpio Full Moon on May 3 lights your fourth house of home, family, and roots — a housing or family decision reaches clarity. The Taurus New Moon on May 16 falls in your tenth house of career and public role — the most important career new moon of your year. The Blue Moon on May 31 lands in your fifth house of romance, creativity, and joy — a creative project or romantic connection reaches a climax as the month closes. Abundance and expansion is the theme, and for you that abundance climbs from home to career to play.

Key Dates for Leo in May 2026

| Date | Transit | Meaning for Leo | Do / Avoid | |------|---------|-------------------|------------| | May 3 | Full Moon in Scorpio (Flower Moon) | Home, family, housing — Do: make the housing or family decision you have been delaying / Avoid: white-knuckling a situation that has ended | | May 9 | Venus square Pluto | Power in love or family — Do: name the dynamic / Avoid: dramatic ultimatums | | May 16 | New Moon in Taurus | Career and public role reset — Do: set a 12-month intention for what you want to be known for / Avoid: setting it small | | May 20 | Sun enters Gemini | Network and audience energy — Do: reach out to your community / Avoid: trying to do it all alone | | May 25 | Mars enters Virgo | Money and income work heats up — Do: revisit pricing and budgets / Avoid: impulse spending | | May 31 | Blue Moon in Sagittarius (Micro) | Romance, creativity, joy — Do: ship the art, take the creative risk / Avoid: postponing joy for one more revision |

Career & Money

Leo, the most important day of your work year is May 16. The Taurus New Moon in your tenth house of career and public role is your annual direction reset — set the 12-month intention for what you want to be known for by May 2027. Taurus is a fixed earth sign like your Sun sign, so the intention tends to stick; be specific about title, scope, and income. When Mars enters your second house of income on May 25, the work to monetize that intention begins in earnest — revisit pricing, contracts, and budgets, and quote the higher number. The Blue Moon on May 31 in your fifth house can bring a creative project or romantic connection to a public climax — a launch, a performance, a publication, a turning point in your public story. The Scorpio Full Moon on May 3 in your fourth house pulls attention to home earlier in the month; a housing, family, or living-arrangement decision reaches clarity, and the home base you settle now is what funds the public push later. Bookend each workday with a short walk so the May ambition does not become June burnout. Pair this career reset with our crystals for wealth framework.

Love & Relationships

The Scorpio Full Moon on May 3 in your fourth house makes early May about family, home, and inherited patterns. A housing, family, or living-arrangement decision will involve a partner or potential partner. Single Leo may meet someone through a creative project, performance, or public event in the days around the May 31 Blue Moon; partnered Leo will need to align on a housing or family decision that the May 3 Full Moon has surfaced. The Venus-Pluto square on May 9 can expose a power undercurrent around money, attention, or visibility that has been quietly shaping the relationship — name it kindly rather than dramatically, and notice whether the dynamic mirrors a family pattern. The Blue Moon on May 31 in your fifth house is your most romantic full moon of the year — playful, creative, generous love; the final week of May is one of your best windows of the season for first dates, rekindling, or simply making real time for play in a partnership. For support in softening pride and opening the heart, see our crystals for love collection.

Health & Wellness

The fourth-house Scorpio Full Moon on May 3 makes early May a body-and-home check-in — fix the bedroom, address the lighting, deepen the rest. Citrine is traditionally associated with sunlight, optimism, and steady will — often used as a desk companion during periods of career focus or when the inner critic gets loud. With the May 16 tenth-house New Moon, the second half of May is high-energy; bookend each workday with a short walk so the ambition does not become burnout. The fourth-house Scorpio Full Moon on May 3 makes early May a body-and-home check-in — fix the bedroom, address the lighting, deepen the rest. Leo often carries tension in the upper back and heart; chest-opening stretches, sunrise walks, and meals shared with people who actually love you are medicine. Bookend each workday in the second half of May with a short walk so the May ambition does not become June burnout.

Crystal of the Month: Citrine

Why this crystal fits Leo this month. Leo, your ruling planet is the Sun, and Citrine is its stone — sun-colored, sun-warm, sun-steady. With the most important career new moon of your year on May 16 and a creative Blue Moon on May 31, Citrine lines up with both your public role (tenth house) and your creative joy (fifth house). It is the stone that helps your ambition stay warm instead of cold. How to use it during May. Hold Citrine on May 16 when you set your 12-month career intention. Keep it on your desk from May 25 when the income work heats up. Carry it on May 31 when the creative or romantic moment arrives. Best date to use it. May 16, the Taurus New Moon in your tenth house — with Citrine in hand, write the one-sentence answer to: What do I want to be publicly known for by May 2027? Read more. Deep dive in our full Citrine meaning guide and explore the complete Leo crystals collection.

Monthly Crystal Ritual

Date: May 16, Taurus New Moon (tenth house of career and public role). 1. Cleanse your Citrine in morning sunlight for ten minutes. 2. Write your current one-sentence professional identity. Then write the version you want to be true by May 2027. 3. Because the Scorpio Full Moon two weeks earlier was about home, write a third line: The home or family foundation that supports this career vision is ___. 4. Place the Citrine on all three lines overnight in the wealth corner of your home (the far-left corner from your front door). Each morning for a week, hold the stone for two minutes and reread the future-identity line aloud.

Shop

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Leo crystal guide for stones traditionally connected with confidence, courage, and abundance — Citrine pairs beautifully with Sunstone for a Leo ambition-and-joy kit.

FAQ

What should Leo avoid in May 2026? Avoid skipping the May 3 home and family clarity in order to chase the May 16 career recognition. The career new moon lands properly only if the home foundation has been settled first; the spotlight follows the foundation, not the other way around. Is May 2026 a good month for Leo? Yes — especially for career and creative play. The May 16 New Moon in your tenth house is the strongest career new moon of your year. What does the May 16 Taurus New Moon mean for Leo? It activates your tenth house of career and public role. The 12-month intention you set this day shapes your entire professional year. How will the May 3 Scorpio Full Moon affect Leo? It activates your fourth house of home and family. A housing, family, or living-arrangement decision reaches clarity in the first week of May. What is the best crystal for Leo in May 2026? Citrine. With a career New Moon and a creative Blue Moon, the work of May is ambition that stays warm and human — and Citrine is the traditional sun-and-abundance ally. Leo-only question: Should I make a career move in May 2026? Yes. The Taurus New Moon in your tenth house on May 16 is one of the strongest promotion, title-change, and launch windows of your year. Plan the announcement for May 18–25.

All stones are genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.
